General Store Office Assistant & Bookkeeper • Track and record deposited checks and sale transaction revenue through the POS system and business financial banking account. • Provide monthly billing invoices for client expenses. • Cash personal/business checks, send and receive money for customers (e.g., MoneyGram). • Calculate and document payroll taxes, wages, and register reports with QuickBooks and 21st Century Accounting. • Receive and answer calls from customers needing assistance for various business-related matters and issues.
